title: stelis tempestuosa
intro: Stelis tempestuosa, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stelis tempestuosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in folk remedies to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
